when.test: filter != null and filter.beginTime != null and filter.beginTime != ''
filter != null and filter.endTime != null and filter.endTime != ''
filter != null and filter.beginTime != null and filter.beginTime != ''

if.test: filter != null and filter.displayName != null and filter.displayName != ''
filter != null and filter.employeeNo != null and filter.employeeNo != ''
filter != null and filter.personType != null and filter.personType != ''

when.test: filter != null and filter.beginTime != null and filter.beginTime != ''

mapper.select:
SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM ps.arrival_at)::int AS hour, COUNT(*)::bigint AS arrivalCount, COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN ps.status = 'closed' THEN ps.dwell_seconds ELSE GREATEST(0, FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ps.arrival_at))))::bigint END ), 0)::bigint AS dwellSeconds FROM presence_sessions ps
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM ps.arrival_at) ORDER BY hour

SELECT ps.id AS sessionId, ps.person_id AS personId, COALESCE(p.display_name, '未知访客') AS displayName, COALESCE(p.person_type::text, 'stranger') AS personKind, COALESCE(p.employee_no, '') AS employeeNo, c.device_name AS deviceName, ps.arrival_at AS arrivalAt, ps.departure_at AS departureAt, ps.status::text AS status, CASE WHEN ps.status = 'closed' THEN ps.dwell_seconds::bigint ELSE GREATEST(0, FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ps.arrival_at))))::bigint END AS dwellSeconds, fp.image_url AS face_image_url FROM presence_sessions ps INNER JOIN camera c ON c.id = ps.camera_id LEFT JOIN persons p ON p.id = ps.person_id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT image_url FROM face_profiles WHERE person_id = ps.person_id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) fp ON ps.person_id IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ps.arrival_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.id AS personId, p.display_name AS displayName, p.person_type::text AS personKind, p.employee_no AS employeeNo, COALESCE(p.note, '') AS note, COALESCE(p.face_image_url, fp.image_url) AS face_image_url, bp.image_url AS body_image_url, latest.arrival_at AS lastSeenAt FROM persons p LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT ps.arrival_at FROM presence_sessions ps WHERE ps.person_id = p.id ORDER BY ps.arrival_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT image_url FROM face_profiles WHERE person_id = p.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) fp ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT image_url FROM body_profiles WHERE person_id = p.id ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) bp ON TRUE ORDER BY p.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE persons SET display_name = #{displayName}, person_type = CAST(#{personType} AS person_type), employee_no = #{employeeNo}, note = #{note}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{personId}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM persons WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE presence_sessions SET person_id = #{toPersonId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}
UPDATE behavior_logs SET person_id = #{toPersonId} WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}
UPDATE person_daily_attendance SET person_id = #{toPersonId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}
UPDATE face_profiles SET person_id = #{toPersonId} WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}
UPDATE body_profiles SET person_id = #{toPersonId} WHERE person_id = #{fromPersonId}

UPDATE presence_sessions SET status = CAST(#{status} AS session_status), departure_at = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'closed' THEN COALESCE(departure_at, NOW()) ELSE NULL END, dwell_seconds = CASE WHEN #{status} = 'closed' THEN GREATEST(0, FLOOR(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (COALESCE(departure_at, NOW()) - arrival_at))))::int ELSE NULL END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{sessionId}
mapper.select: SELECT person_id FROM presence_sessions WHERE track_key = #{trackKey} AND person_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY arrival_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO persons (display_name, person_type, employee_no, note, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{displayName}, CAST(#{personType} AS person_type), #{employeeNo}, #{note}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM persons ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO face_profiles (person_id, embedding, image_url, created_at) VALUES (#{personId}, array_fill(0.0::real, ARRAY[512])::vector(512), #{imageUrl}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE camera SET device_name = #{deviceName}, online_status = CASE WHEN #{isActive} IS NULL THEN online_status WHEN #{isActive} THEN 'online'::camera_online_status ELSE 'offline'::camera_online_status END, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{cameraId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*)::bigint FROM persons WHERE person_type IN ('student', 'staff')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ps.person_id)::bigint FROM presence_sessions ps INNER JOIN persons p ON p.id = ps.person_id WHERE p.person_type IN ('student', 'staff') AND ps.arrival_at >= #{today}::date AND ps.arrival_at < (#{today}::date + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND ps.camera_id = #{cameraId}
